english: I drink coffee every morning.
He likes reading books.
We are going to Beijing tomorrow.

chinese: 她昨天买了一件新衣服。
english: She bought a new piece of clothing yesterday.
pinyin: Tā zuótiān mǎi le yī jiàn xīn yīfu.
parts: 她|昨|天|买|了|一|件|新|衣|服

english: The food at the restaurant is delicious.

chinese: 我学习汉语已经两年了。
english: I have been studying Chinese for two years.
pinyin: Wǒ xuéxí Hànyǔ yǐjīng liǎng nián le.
parts: 我|学|习|汉|语|已|经|两|年|了

english: The train station is not far from my home.
pinyin: Huǒchēzhàn lí wǒ jiā bù yuǎn.

english: It's too hot; I want to drink water.
pinyin: Tiānqì tài rè le, wǒ xiǎng hē shuǐ.

chinese: 他一边走路一边打电话。
english: He walks while talking on the phone.
pinyin: Tā yībiān zǒulù yībiān dǎ diànhuà.
parts: 他|一|边|走|路|一|边|打|电|话

english: The supermarket opens at eight.
My younger brother is a bit taller than my sister.
It is raining outside.
I plan to change jobs next year.
The plane has arrived.

chinese: 他一边吃饭一边看电视。
english: He eats while watching TV.
pinyin: Tā yībiān chīfàn yībiān kàn diànshì.
parts: 他|一|边|吃|饭|一|边|看|电|视

english: I have to get up early tomorrow.

chinese: 我们坐公共汽车去学校。
english: We take the bus to school.
pinyin: Wǒmen zuò gōnggòng qìchē qù xuéxiào.
parts: 我|们|坐|公|共|汽|车|去|学|校

english: She doesn't feel well today.
I'm planning to see a movie this weekend.

chinese: 天气冷了，多穿一件衣服。
english: It's cold; put on another layer.
pinyin: Tiānqì lěng le, duō chuān yī jiàn yīfu.
parts: 天|气|冷|了|多|穿|一|件|衣|服

english: He finished his homework yesterday.
pinyin: Tā zuótiān bǎ zuòyè xiě wán le.

chinese: 我们一起去超市买东西吧。
english: Let's go to the supermarket together.
pinyin: Wǒmen yīqǐ qù chāoshì mǎi dōngxi ba.
parts: 我|们|一|起|去|超|市|买|东|西|吧

chinese: 她每天早上跑步半小时。
english: She runs for half an hour every morning.
pinyin: Tā měitiān zǎoshang pǎobù bàn xiǎoshí.
parts: 她|每|天|早|上|跑|步|半|小|时

english: My younger brother starts primary school this year.
I usually rest at home on weekends.
pinyin: Wǒ zhōumò yībān zài jiā xiūxi.

english: We are going to the airport tomorrow.

chinese: 他一边听音乐一边做饭。
english: He cooks while listening to music.
pinyin: Tā yībiān tīng yīnyuè yībiān zuòfàn.
parts: 他|一|边|听|音|乐|一|边|做|饭

english: Let's take a walk together tonight.
She swims for half an hour every day.
I want to buy a red piece of clothing.
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yī jiàn hóngsè yīfu.

english: This piece of clothing is a little expensive.
He was late for work today.
My younger sister is sick.
We agreed to meet tomorrow.

chinese: 他生病的时候还在工作。
english: He kept working even while he was sick.
pinyin: Tā shēngbìng de shíhou hái zài gōngzuò.
parts: 他|生|病|的|时|候|还|在|工|作

english: I run every morning.
She gave the gift to her friend.
pinyin: Tā bǎ lǐwù gěi le péngyou.

english: I want to find a new job.
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng zhǎo yī gè xīn gōngzuò.

english: They are talking.

chinese: 我们一起去饭店吃饭吧。
english: Let's go eat at a restaurant together.
pinyin: Wǒmen yīqǐ qù fàndiàn chīfàn ba.
parts: 我|们|一|起|去|饭|店|吃|饭|吧

english: She bought a lot of things.
pinyin: Tā mǎi le hěn duō dōngxi.

english: My older brother is taller than me.
Can you swim?
I can't dance.
He sings very well.
pinyin: Tā chànggē chàng de hěn hǎo.

english: We are going to the airport to see our friend off.
She cycles to work every day.
I plan to travel this weekend.
What is the weather like?

chinese: 今天天气很好，我们出去走走吧。
english: The weather is great today; let's go for a walk.
pinyin: Jīntiān tiānqì hěn hǎo, wǒmen chūqù zǒuzou ba.
parts: 今|天|天|气|很|好|我|们|出|去|走|走|吧
